questionHtml: An additional experiment was conducted in which only the sulfuric acid catalyst was titrated with NaOH (aq). Outline why this experiment was necessary.
markschemeHtml:
to determine volume/moles of NaOH used up by the catalyst/sulfuric acid «in the titration»
OR
to eliminate/reduce «systematic» error caused by acid catalyst ✔


Do not accept “control” OR “standard” alone.

meta.title: An additional experiment was conducted in which only the sulfuric acid catalyst was titrated with NaOH (aq). Outline why this experiment was necessary.
